# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account) with core resources & connectivity + Diagnostic Settings +  Monitoring 
parameters:
- name: appServicePlanName
  type: string   # Name of the App service plan in which to create this resource. e.g., 'myAppServicePlan'   
- name: location
  defaultValue: eastus2     # Location for all resources (e.g, westus)     
resources:
# Web app and related services - Core Resources  
- name: webappname       // Name of the App Service resource to create e.g., 'mywebapp'   
type: Microsoft.Web/sites     # ARM template type for creating a new Azure Resource Provider (ARP) instance – this is required when you are going through an array or properties in your main definition file  
properties:      // Properties of the App Service resource to create e.g.,   
location: '@{parameters('location')}'     # Location for all resources      
kind: 'app'         # Kind parameter - this is required when you are going through an array or properties in your main definition file  
sku: '{ sku : { name : "S1", tier : “Standard”, size : ‘S1’ }}'     // Sku parameters e.g.,    {'name':'Basic','tier':'standard',size:'s1'}     
appServicePlan:   # App Service Plan related properties      
- name: '@{parameters('appServicePlanName') + "-plan"}'         // Name of the app service plan resource to create e.g.,    ‘myAppServicePlan’ -> myAppServicePlan-plan    
kind: appserviceplan      // Kind parameter for creating a new Azure Resource Provider (ARP) instance  
properties:       // Properties related with App Service Plan, like pricing tier and location etc        {'name':'@{parameters('appServicePlanName') + "-plan"}' , 'location': ‘eastus’}     
# SQL Database - Core Resources   
- name: sqlserver     # Name of the Sql Server resource to create e.g.,   “mySqlServer”      
type: Microsoft.Sql/servers        // ARM template type for creating a new Azure Resource Provider (ARP) instance         {'name': 'myserver'}     
properties:          // Properties related with SQL Database, like location etc     {‘location’ : parameters('location')}    # Location of the resource group to create this server in       “westus”   }]}'        ]}`;
